ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "quarter_ended" TEXT /* Date representing the quarter ended */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code for the state */,
  "deaths_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of deaths per 10,000 population */,
  "cases_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of cases per 10,000 population */,
  "tests_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of tests per 10,000 population */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "deaths_per_10k" TEXT /* Deaths per 10,000 population */,
  "cases_per_10k" TEXT /* Cases per 10,000 population */,
  "tests_per_10k" TEXT /* Tests per 10,000 population */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_quarter_ended FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_ended") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "population_density" TEXT /* Population density of the state */,
  "area_sq_miles" TEXT /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarter (e.g., Mar 31, 2020) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the quarter */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the quarter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., CDC, WHO) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report contents */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health metrics associated with the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., epidemiology, public health) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed metric */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metrics associated with the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affected metric */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of check (e.g., completeness, accuracy, consistency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE " dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., JSON object defining the layout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard that the visualization belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart, map) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to render the visualization */,
  "options" TEXT /* Options for customizing the visualization (e.g., colors, labels) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "notifications" INTEGER /* Whether the user wants to receive notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
